Roger-Yves Bost, one of the most renowned show jumpers in France, became an Olympic champion at the age of 50 during the Rio Games. As a counselor for the Franco-Chinese Equestrian Association, Bost shares with CGTN his profound understanding and love for both horses and equestrian sports.
